title: Amtech - Plastic Tool Box, Waterproof Storage Box with Twin Locking Points for Secure Storage, Durable Toolbox for Daily Use, Stackable Space-Saving Design, Maximum Capacity of 4kg/ 4.7L
features: DURABLE: This 290mm (12") lockable and stackable storage case has a 4kg/4.7l capacity and is made from tough, moulded polypropylene for durability
WEATHER RESISTANT AND STACKABLE: With a weather-resistant design and twin locking points, it is designed for multiple cases to be stacked together
EASY TO USE: Simple setup and operation for beginners and professionals
WORKSHOP FRIENDLY: Ideal for home use or trade environments
STABLE OPERATION: Designed to minimise movement during cutting tasks
description: Product Description Constructed from tough, moulded polypropylene, the storage case withstands daily wear and tear for long-lasting protection, making it a reliable storage solution for both professionals and home DIYers. It’s also weather-resistant to protect your tools from moisture and environmental damage. The twin locking points keep your tools and materials organised and safe from theft or accidental access, giving you peace of mind while working on-site or storing them at home. With a stackable design, multiple storage cases can be stacked together so you can keep your workspace tidy and easily access your tools when you need them. The 4kg/ 4.7L capacity also provides plenty of room for storing your tools.
